headline: Zero Telemetry.
subheadline: We believe your code and conversations belong to you. Ollama Pet makes no network calls to external servers.

features.title: 100% Local Inference
features.description: All LLM processing happens on your hardware via Ollama.

features.title: Local Storage Only
features.description: Chat history is saved strictly on your local disk.

features.title: Works Offline
features.description: Turn off your Wi-Fi. The pet keeps thinking.
